{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032402073408F7744E37E1EFDE68BC"}"},"total":1227},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7166497405134340896","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常霸气的一本书，十多年的老书虫就喜欢这种，没有丝毫拖拖拉拉！简单霸气的爽文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668580324,"group_id":"7084963784288111631","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwPDsVMvwzrcMZVuWkqm5VVgyHsICB+dAlVhbIYeXW9b","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873648&x-signature=PE4Lf3CdmV2eVKh7syh5Tz4y2hU%3D","user_id":"1601338484210835","user_name":".飞飞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1601338484210835","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1667941223,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7084963784288111631","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+暴力碾压+融合现实+神明世界观】
异界入侵，蓝星湮灭。
苏羽回到超现实游戏《永恒》开启的前一秒。
获取唯一天赋：光环之主。
光环效果翻倍，消耗却只有1%！
先知先觉，暴力提升！
脱离职业限制，全系全修。
脱离装备限制，开出第二套装备拦，碾压一切！
“我在人间全无敌，不与神战与谁战！”
“我都无敌了，一刀斩神也很合理吧？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4fab8fda062e6f80dc46cc3bba1de7b6","author":"青天牛蟒","author_id":"","book_id":"7084963784288111631","book_name":"网游：开局卡BUG，无限叠伤害","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4984人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7086101901133447721","read_count":"4984","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1205786"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"506","tags":"游戏体育,重生,网游","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/66538e3e898a5a72283488d59e36c5f9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779473254&x-signature=032TvfPKQgUgG6zZjwafxbAxK28%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4143379520695643","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.1818877e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032402073408F7744E37E1EFDE68BC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读29小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":23079,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":104897,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":24159},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7176665533034185505","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢，这本书一开始看的时候，杀那个boss的时候我说“这书也就这样了，前期数值就这么高，后面不早得崩了？”确实，战力崩了。但是崩的又很合理（2333）。我看过不少类似的小说。网游侵入现实，几年后毁灭世界，主角重生回来准备拯救世界。这样的真的很多，但是主角都是畏手畏脚的，要么是变强了，又因为种种原因被压制了，要么就是一路的绊脚石，打了小的来了大的，打了大的来了老的。这种的小说是真的多。
这本就很不一样了，目标很明确就是变强，一路上的敌人全是垫脚石，神挡杀神魔挡杀魔。一路从永恒杀到上古，杀到星空，杀到其他的神界，最后因为“命运”被“宇宙”排斥，被“游戏服务器”踢出，再去给作者的小说进行结局，没有圣母，也没有女主（无所谓）。
我看网文小说遵守一个宗旨，从来不带脑子看小说，因为没必要去记住这些，既然都看网文了，那就要的是一个爽。就我现在看来，这本书是我在番茄看过的最棒的爽文。结局也是最有创意的，很久以前看小说就有过这种想法，有没有小说作者会在大结局的时候，让主角钻出来给自己结局了。没想到还真找到了哈哈。
2022年12月13号看完。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1670948022,"group_id":"7084963784288111631","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8/iWex1hE84kfH1pfFs6S7M784sSAwFbYswKd93996I","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e0a65298bd2c4330b3812319e08a116b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882444&x-signature=Aphwe4XPL7kZaD6hziBjM%2B9tHVI%3D","user_id":"3245347256418366","user_name":"CaineJade"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3245347256418366","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1777187659,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7084963784288111631","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+暴力碾压+融合现实+神明世界观】
